UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user settings and profile information.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

lang.description: The preferred language of the user.

dept.description: The preferred department of the user.

theme.description: The preferred theme of the user.

createdAt.description: The time the profile was created.
